title: DataDotComSettings - Metadata API
description: Represents the org's Data.com settings. This type extends the Metadata metadata type and inherits its fullName field.

enableAccountExportButtonOff.description: Indicates whether Account Export to Excel is enabled for Prospector (true) or not (false). Default value is false.

enableAccountImportButtonOff.description: Indicates whether Account Import to CRM is enabled for Prospector (true) or not (false). Default value is false.

enableAllowDupeContactFromLead.description: Indicates whether Prospector Lead Import Duplicate Check is enabled (true) or not (false). Default value is false.

enableAllowDupeLeadFromContact.description: Indicates whether Prospector Contact Import Duplicate Check is enabled (true) or not (false). Default value is false.

enableCleanUpgradeRequested.description: This field is no longer in use.

enableContactExportButtonOff.description: Indicates whether Contact Export to Excel is enabled for Prospector (true) or not (false). Default value is false.

enableContactImportButtonOff.description: Indicates whether Contact Import to CRM is enabled for Prospector (true) or not (false). Default value is false.

wsdl_segment:
```xml
<xsd:complexType name="DataDotComSettings">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="enableAccountExportButtonOff" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="enableAccountImportButtonOff" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="enableAllowDupeContactFromLead" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="enableAllowDupeLeadFromContact" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="enableContactExportButtonOff" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="enableContactImportButtonOff" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="enableDDCSocialKeyEnabled" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="enableDataDotComCleanEnabled" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="enableDataDotComOptOutsEnabled" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="enableDatacloudAPIEnabled" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
```
